message:
test(conformance): expand Go reference harness and add workspace/sprint/export conformance tests

Extend the conformance test infrastructure to cover newly implemented
features and capture additional legacy command outputs for parity
verification.

Go reference harness:
- Capture next, graph (JSON/DOT/Mermaid), suggest, alerts, sprint-list,
  sprint-show, metrics, and burndown commands from legacy binary
- Add runLegacyJSONOptional and runLegacyText helpers for commands that
  may fail gracefully
- Diagnostic logging for each capture step

New conformance tests:
- Workspace multi-repo triage with ID namespacing collision detection
- Workspace repo filtering by prefix and source_repo matching
- Workspace disabled repo exclusion
- Sprint list/show round-trip validation
- Export-md basic and hooks lifecycle tests
- As-of historical revision loading
- Graph depth stress test for deep dependency chains

Fixture updates:
- bvr.json, bvr_adversarial.json, bvr_extended.json refreshed with
  expanded command outputs and corrected envelope metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
